config.script:
system.perspective.print("in redirect form")
	system.perspective.print("value in redirect form %s"%self.view.params.value)
	system.perspective.print("date in redirect form %s"%self.view.params.date)
	system.perspective.print("WorkStationName in redirect form %s"%self.view.params.WorkStationName)
	system.perspective.print("rowData in redirect form %s"%self.view.params.rowData)
	system.perspective.print("col_index in redirect form %s"%self.view.params.columnIndex)
	system.perspective.print("row_index in redirect form %s"%self.view.params.rowIndex)
	rowCount = self.view.params.rowIndex
	if rowCount == int(0):
		system.perspective.print("in loop1 of redirect form")
		self.view.params.count=1
	elif rowCount == int(1):
		system.perspective.print("in loop2 of redirect form")
		self.view.params.count=2
	elif rowCount == int(2):
		system.perspective.print("in loop3 of redirect form")
		self.view.params.count=3
	else:
		system.perspective.print("in loop4 of redirect form")
		self.view.params.count=4
	
	params={
        "WorkStationName": str(self.view.params.WorkStationName),
        "date": self.view.params.date,
        "rowData": self.view.params.rowData,
        "count": self.view.params.count
    }
	system.perspective.print("All Param: %s"%params)
	#system.perspective.openPopup(id, view)
	try:
		system.perspective.print("Count is -=> %s" %self.view.params.count)
		system.perspective.openPopup(
		    'myPopupForQform',  # Unique popup ID
		    'Project_VECV/Report/QualityDefects',  # Replace with actual popup view path
		    params={
		        "WorkStationName": str(self.view.params.WorkStationName),
		        "date": self.view.params.date,
		        "rowData": self.view.params.rowData,
		        "count": self.view.params.count
		    },
		    title="ALL DEFECTS CAPTURED",  # Customize the popup title
		    modal=True  # Set to True if you want to prevent interactions with the main screen
		)
	except Exception as e:
		system.perspective.print("error msg = %s"%e)
	system.perspective.print("End of redirect form")
